en-US.description:
Ducat Wallet is a professional developer tool for engineers building on the Ducat Protocol.
Designed for seamless integration, Ducat Wallet provides a complete interface for connecting services, inspecting protocol interactions, and validating implementations in real-time.
Features:

Connect directly to Ducat Protocol infrastructure
Monitor and inspect transactions
Debug and validate service integrations
View protocol responses and data in real-time
Streamlined interface optimized for developer workflows

Built for developers who need reliable, direct access to Ducat Protocol from their mobile device.
en-US.title: Ducat Wallet
en-US.subtitle: Decentralised Credit Platform
en-US.releaseNotes: DUCAT 0.0.2 improves the Mutinynet wallet with hardened BTC price resolution, liquidation vault loading that no longer depends on a single price source, cleaner Sepolia ETH and Sepolia USDC send flows, stronger amount slider interaction, and clearer receive QR codes with asset-specific icons.

review.notes:
Ducat Wallet is a professional developer tool for engineers building on the Ducat Protocol.
Designed for seamless integration, Ducat Wallet provides a complete interface for connecting services, inspecting protocol interactions, and validating implementations in real-time.
Features:

Connect directly to Ducat Protocol infrastructure
Monitor and inspect transactions
Debug and validate service integrations
View protocol responses and data in real-time
Streamlined interface optimized for developer workflows

Built for developers who need reliable, direct access to Ducat Protocol from their mobile device.

  DEMO WALLET SETUP
  1. Tap "Import Wallet"
  2. Enter this 12-word seed phrase:
shuffle spoil what boil where govern wonder quiz breeze suit village any
  3. Set PIN: 123456
  4. Skip biometric prompt if shown

  This wallet is pre-loaded with BTC and UNIT balances, an active vault with deposited BTC collateral and borrowed UNIT, and full transaction history. Every feature is immediately visible.

  FEATURES VISIBLE ON IMPORT
  • Home: BTC and UNIT balances with recent activity
  • Receive: Deposit address + QR code
  • Send: Full send flow (enter address + amount)
  • Vault tab: Active vault — deposited BTC collateral, borrowed UNIT, health factor
  • Activity: Complete transaction history
  • Settings: Biometric unlock, passkey backup, seed phrase export

  DISCLAIMERS
  • All assets (BTC, UNIT) are development tokens with zero real-world monetary value
  • Self-custody wallet only — NOT an exchange, brokerage, or ICO
  • No trading, swaps, fiat ramps, or token sales in the app
  • "Vault" is a collateral-management tool in a sandboxed environment
  • iPhone-only. All wallet data stored on-device via Secure Enclave/Keychain

  ---
  Resolution Center Response

  Thank you for your review. We've addressed each point:

  2.3.3 — SCREENSHOTS: iPad screenshots removed. App is now iPhone-only.

  2.1 — DEMO WALLET: No account needed. Tap "Import Wallet" and enter:
shuffle spoil what boil where govern wonder quiz breeze suit village any
  Set PIN: 123456. This wallet has pre-loaded BTC and UNIT balances, an active vault, and transaction history — every feature is immediately accessible.

  2.1/3.1.5 — NOT AN EXCHANGE:
  • Self-custody wallet — users hold private keys on-device, we never take custody
  • No trading, swapping, or fiat on/off ramps
  • No token sale or ICO
  • All assets are development tokens with zero real-world monetary value
  • "Vault" is a collateral-management demo, not a financial product

  Happy to provide additional information. Thank you.
